title: Hindustan Petroleum is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hindustan Petroleum is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindustan Petroleum:
Hindustan Petroleum is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
